name: common_sense_c414737b-ad45-4aef-835b-77f677f58364
prompt: A man in a light gray suit walks through a well-organized hobby shop filled with a variety of toy model kits. The camera follows him from behind with a medium shot at eye level, capturing the neatly arranged shelves on either side. These shelves hold an assortment of vehicle model kits, with some display figures showcasing the finished products. Two propeller biplanes hang directly overhead, one red and one white. At the end of the aisle, a wall display features assembled models of ships and tanks. The shop is softly lit by artificial lighting, creating a cozy and somewhat vintage ambiance due to the densely packed shelves.  As the man reaches the end of the aisle, he turns left and continues walking through the store. To his right is a checkout counter with a computer and cash register. Another man, wearing a black jacket with a distinctive white stripe, a dark-colored watch on his left wrist, and a black glove on his left hand, enters the frame from the right. He is working on stocking and organizing the toy units. The camera then pans to the right with a medium shot at eye level, capturing both individuals in the shot. The man in the gray suit speaks, and the man in the black jacket turns to face him, revealing a white shirt underneath, while picking up a clipboard with his right hand. The clip concludes as he replies to the man in the gray suit but before he can look up and make eye contact.  The background features a row of floor-to-ceiling windows on the left side, letting in a large amount of light from outside. The center and right-hand sides of the background showcase multiple shelves of completed tank models, with a large flat-screen television displaying a video of people playing with remote-controlled tanks.
